charts.title: 日活跃用户数
charts.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id)

charts.title: APP活跃率
charts.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) FROM events)

charts.title: Porsche+板块活跃率
charts.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%porsche_page%' OR span_name ILIKE '%navigation_bar_porsche%') / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id), 0)

charts.title: Porsche+页面平均时长(秒)
charts.sql: AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (page_end_time::TIMESTAMP - page_start_time::TIMESTAMP))) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%porsche_page%' OR span_name ILIKE '%navigation_bar_porsche%')

charts.title: Porsche+页面人均打开次数
charts.sql: COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%porsche_page%' OR span_name ILIKE '%navigation_bar_porsche%') / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id), 0)

charts.title: 发现板块活跃率
charts.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%discovery_page%' OR span_name ILIKE '%navigation_bar_discovery%') / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id), 0)

charts.title: 发现页面平均时长(秒)
charts.sql: AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (page_end_time::TIMESTAMP - page_start_time::TIMESTAMP))) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%discovery_page%' OR span_name ILIKE '%navigation_bar_discovery%')

charts.title: AI路书生成活跃率
charts.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%post_detail_page_ai_travel_guide%' OR span_name ILIKE '%trival_guide_page_detail_tab_add_place_entry_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%post_detail_page_generated_travel_guide_button_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%profile_page_travel_guide_tab_create_trip_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%profile_page_travel_guide_tab_add_trip_entry_click%') / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id), 0)

charts.title: AI路书生成人均使用次数

title.text: AI路书生成人均使用次数

charts.sql: COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%post_detail_page_ai_travel_guide%' OR span_name ILIKE '%trival_guide_page_detail_tab_add_place_entry_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%post_detail_page_generated_travel_guide_button_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%profile_page_travel_guide_tab_create_trip_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%profile_page_travel_guide_tab_add_trip_entry_click%') / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%post_detail_page_ai_travel_guide%' OR span_name ILIKE '%trival_guide_page_detail_tab_add_place_entry_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%post_detail_page_generated_travel_guide_button_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%profile_page_travel_guide_tab_create_trip_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%profile_page_travel_guide_tab_add_trip_entry_click%'), 0)

charts.title: AI路书生成使用率
charts.sql: COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%post_detail_page_ai_travel_guide%' OR span_name ILIKE '%trival_guide_page_detail_tab_add_place_entry_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%post_detail_page_generated_travel_guide_button_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%profile_page_travel_guide_tab_create_trip_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%profile_page_travel_guide_tab_add_trip_entry_click%') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)

charts.title: 分享码生成占比
charts.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%share_code%') / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id), 0)

charts.title: 分享码使用占比
charts.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%share_code%' AND span_name ILIKE '%add%' AND span_name NOT ILIKE '%close%') / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT reduser_id), 0)

charts.title: 笔记卡片点击率
charts.sql: COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%post_card_click%') / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%post_card_cardshow%'), 0)

charts.title: 点赞率
charts.sql: COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%post_like_click%') / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%post_card_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%post_card_cardshow%'), 0)

charts.title: 收藏率
charts.sql: COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%save_button_click%') / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%post_card_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%post_card_cardshow%'), 0)

charts.title: 关注转化率
charts.sql: COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%follow_button_click%') / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%profile_picture_click%' OR span_name ILIKE '%post_card_click%'), 0)

charts.title: 视频播放率
charts.sql: SUM(CASE WHEN rednote_video_post_is_play = 1.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN rednote_post_type = 'video' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)

charts.title: POI交互率
charts.sql: COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_name ILIKE '%poi%') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)

charts.title: 次日留存用户数
charts.sql: retention_day1
